Award to Asst. Prof. Tunçer Baykaş from IEEE Standards Association

The IEEE Standards Association awarded Asst. Prof. Tunçer Baykaş from KHAS Department of Electrical-Electronics Engineering regarding his contributions to the “Coexistence Methods for 802.11 and 802.15.4 based systems operating in the sub 1-GHz Frequency Bands” standard developed by IEEE 802.19 Working Group.

We congratulate Dr. Baykaş and wish him success.
